summary: The Alaska Native Heritage Center (ANHC) is coordinating two week-long Athabascan language trainings this summer. title: A word from the president, July 2013
summary: Thank you for taking the time to catch up on the latest news and events at your corporation. Here in Alaska, it’s hard to believe the summer season is already halfway over.
